message:
test(runtime): expand blocking pool TOCTOU test to cover handle API

Refactor the test into a shared `run_spawn_shutdown_race()` helper
parameterized by `use_handle_api`. The original test now exercises
both `pool.spawn()` (direct) and `pool.handle().spawn()` (handle API)
paths, each running 10,000 iterations of concurrent spawn + shutdown
to detect lost-task deadlocks on either code path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
